portal.name: Universal Task Intake
portal.description: One file to aim every agent you have — cross-repo, cross-agent, budget-capped

tasks.title: Resolve issue #236: ~358 frontend TypeScript errors in public-record-data-scrapper
tasks.context:
358 TS errors across ~65 files in apps/web/. Root cause: types in packages/core/src/types.ts (camelCase, @public-records/core) and apps/web/src/lib/api/*.ts (snake_case) were updated/extended but test mocks were not. 11 fix categories:
1. HealthScore objects missing avgSentiment (+1) and lastUpdated (+2). Add: avgSentiment: 0.5, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(). 2. GrowthSignal objects missing score (+3). Add: score: 75. 3. Prospect objects missing defaultDate, timeSinceDefault, healthScore, narrative (+4). Add: defaultDate: "2024-01-15", timeSinceDefault: 120, healthScore: { grade: "B", score: 65, ... }, narrative: "Sample narrative". 4. User objects missing emailVerified (+1). Add: emailVerified: true. 5. ImprovementSuggestion missing id (+1). Add: id: "sug-1". 6. ImprovementResult missing changes and metrics (+2). Add: changes: {}, metrics: {}. 7. MLScoring.factors empty objects: replace {} with { healthTrend: 0.5, signalQuality: 0.7, industryRisk: 0.3, timeToRecovery: 0.6, financialStability: 0.8 }. 8. UseAgenticEngineResult mock uses rejectImprovement which doesnt exist on type. 9. CompetitorChart uses string[] for industries instead of IndustryType[]. 10. useDealActions test uses camelCase (orgId, dealId, stageId, amountRequested) but @/lib/api/deals types are snake_case (org_id, deal_id, stage_id, amount_requested). 11. Source files (AgenticDashboard.tsx, AnalyticsDashboard.tsx, use-enrichment.ts etc.) have real type errors too. Reference the types file at packages/core/src/types.ts for the correct shape. Fix all test mocks + source type errors.

dispatch_log.output: No diff on remote (superseded by newer dispatch)
PR #241 merged — reduced 628→357 errors, added type interfaces, recharts deps
tsc still failing after patch — 358 remaining (categories detailed above)

tasks.title: Fix YAML duplicate key issues in application-pipeline files
tasks.context: 21 duplicate key errors across ~10 pipeline files. Clone repo, find all .yaml/.yml files under applications/ directory. For each: run yamllint -d "{extends: default, rules: {key-duplicates: {level: error}}}" . Fix every duplicate key found. Then add a pre-commit hook or CI step that runs yamllint with strict key-duplicates. Session 12257481645995032829 awaiting human review of its patch.

tasks.title: Fix integrity score ceiling — proportional fraud penalties at high scores
tasks.context: Implemented Option A: percentage-based compression at ceiling (500). Scores ≤500 linear, scores >500 compressed at 50% rate. PR #639 created (fix/integrity-ceiling-162). Jules session 15931042222679633953 completed (patch not available locally — reimplemented).
